info.description: AI-powered clinical diagnostic platform. Patients interact with an AI assistant, physicians review AI-generated reports, and administrators manage the full lifecycle.
info.title: LifeGate API

parameters.description: Search by patient name or condition
parameters.name: search

parameters.description: Number of days to look back (default 30)
parameters.name: days

post.description: Authenticate with email and password. Physicians receive a 2FA OTP instead of a token.
Submit the OTP sent to a physician's email after password authentication.

patch.description: Marks the authenticated physician's MDCN license as verified. Requires role=professional.

post.description: Always returns 200 regardless of whether the email exists, to prevent enumeration.
Creates a patient account and returns a JWT. Use /auth/register/start for physician registration.
Accepts multipart/form-data. Physicians can attach a certificate file. Sends an OTP to the provided email.
Appends the user message to the session history, runs EDIS inference, and persists the AI reply.
Generates a physician-review diagnosis, saves a report, and marks the session as completed.
Sends a message to the AI provider and returns a response. For clinical_diagnosis category, credits are consumed.

get.description: Returns pending, active, and completed case buckets for the requesting physician.

patch.description: Allows the owning physician to correct the AI condition, urgency, and confidence score.

post.description: Transitions the case from Pending to Active and assigns it to the requesting physician.
Action values: "approve", "reject", "escalate". When physician_decision is Rejected, rejection_reason is required.

get.description: Returns daily diagnosis counts for the given date range (default last 30 days) plus 10 recent activities.
Returns the user's most recent active session if one exists, or data: null.

BearerAuth.description: Enter your JWT token as: Bearer <token>
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
